name: High Elf
description: High Elves have a keen mind and a mastery of at least the basics of magic, inherited from their long study of the arcane.

name: Wood Elf
description: Wood Elves are fleet of foot and stealthy, masters of moving through the natural world without leaving a trace.

name: Dark Elf (Drow)
description: Drow have lived for millennia in the Underdark. They are stealthy, quick, and possess powerful innate spellcasting.

name: Hill Dwarf
description: Hill Dwarves have keen senses, deep intuition, and remarkable resilience. Their HP maximum increases by 1 per level.

name: Mountain Dwarf
description: Mountain Dwarves are strong and hardy, accustomed to a difficult life in rugged terrain, and proficient with light and medium armor.

name: Lightfoot Halfling
description: Lightfoot Halflings are unusually lucky, nimble, and naturally stealthy. They can attempt to hide even when obscured by a creature one size larger.

name: Stout Halfling
description: Stout Halflings are hardier than average halflings, with some resistance to poison and a constitution toughened by their rugged upbringing.

name: Forest Gnome
description: Forest Gnomes have an innate talent with illusions and an instinctive quickness and stealth that belies their non-threatening appearance.

name: Rock Gnome
description: Rock Gnomes have an extraordinary aptitude for invention, tinkering with ordinary objects and tools to craft magical gadgets and devices.

name: Chromatic Dragonborn
description: Descended from chromatic dragons — black, blue, green, red, or white. Their breath weapon reflects their draconic ancestor's damage type.

name: Gem Dragonborn
description: Descended from gem dragons — amethyst, crystal, emerald, sapphire, or topaz. They possess a unique psionic resonance.

name: Metallic Dragonborn
description: Descended from metallic dragons — brass, bronze, copper, gold, or silver. Known for their diplomatic temperaments and protective breath weapons.
